content.json:
Lab05 Case View — Canary-only Encoded PowerShell → Decoded Payload → Correlated Egress

Signal: Sysmon EID 1 EncodedCommand decoded from RenderedDescription

Correlation: EID 1 ↔ EID 3 joined by ProcessGuid

Response: incident auto-tagged lab05 and escalated to High

content.query:
let Host = "{Host}";
let Marker = "{Marker}";
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 1
| where RenderedDescription has "EncodedCommand"
| extend EncodedBlob = extract(@"(?i)(?:-enc(?:odedcommand)?\s+)([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(EncodedBlob)
| extend DecodedRaw = base64_decode_tostring(EncodedBlob)
| extend Decoded = replace_regex(DecodedRaw, @"\x00", "")
| where Decoded has Marker
| summarize LastCanary=max(TimeGenerated)
content.title: Latest canary execution (UTC)

content.query:
let Host = "{Host}";
let Marker = "{Marker}";
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 1
| where RenderedDescription has "EncodedCommand"
| extend EncodedBlob = extract(@"(?i)(?:-enc(?:odedcommand)?\s+)([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(EncodedBlob)
| extend DecodedRaw = base64_decode_tostring(EncodedBlob)
| extend Decoded = replace_regex(DecodedRaw, @"\x00", "")
| where Decoded has Marker
| summarize CanaryHits=count()
content.title: Canary executions (24h)

content.query:
let Host = "{Host}";
let Marker = "{Marker}";
let lookback = 24h;

let ps = Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 1
| where RenderedDescription has "EncodedCommand"
| extend EncodedBlob = extract(@"(?i)(?:-enc(?:odedcommand)?\s+)([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(EncodedBlob)
| extend DecodedRaw = base64_decode_tostring(EncodedBlob)
| extend Decoded = replace_regex(DecodedRaw, @"\x00", "")
| where Decoded has Marker
| extend ProcessGuid = extract(@"(?i)ProcessGuid:\s*({[^}]+})", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(ProcessGuid)
| project Computer, ProcessGuid;

let net = Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 3
| extend ProcessGuid = extract(@"(?i)ProcessGuid:\s*({[^}]+})", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(ProcessGuid)
| project Computer, ProcessGuid;

ps
| join kind=innerunique net on Computer, ProcessGuid
| summarize CorrelatedEgress=count()
content.title: Canary correlated egress (24h)

content.query:
let Host = "{Host}";
let Marker = "{Marker}";
let lookback = 2h;

let start = ago(lookback);
let stop  = now();
let step  = 1m;

let ps = Event
| where TimeGenerated between (start .. stop)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 1
| where RenderedDescription has "EncodedCommand"
| extend EncodedBlob = extract(@"(?i)(?:-enc(?:odedcommand)?\s+)([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(EncodedBlob)
| extend DecodedRaw = base64_decode_tostring(EncodedBlob)
| extend Decoded = replace_regex(DecodedRaw, @"\x00", "")
| where Decoded has Marker
| extend ProcessGuid = extract(@"(?i)ProcessGuid:\s*({[^}]+})", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(ProcessGuid)
| project TimeGenerated=TimeGenerated, Signal="ProcessCreate", ProcessGuid;

let net = Event
| where TimeGenerated between (start .. stop)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 3
| extend ProcessGuid = extract(@"(?i)ProcessGuid:\s*({[^}]+})", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(ProcessGuid)
| where ProcessGuid in (ps | distinct ProcessGuid)
| project TimeGenerated=TimeGenerated, Signal="NetworkConnect", ProcessGuid;

union (ps | project TimeGenerated, Signal),
      (net | project TimeGenerated, Signal)
| make-series Count=count() default=0 on TimeGenerated from start to stop step step by Signal
| render columnchart
content.title: Canary timeline (ProcessCreate + NetworkConnect)

content.query:
let Host = "{Host}";
let Marker = "{Marker}";
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 1
| where RenderedDescription has "EncodedCommand"
| extend EncodedBlob = extract(@"(?i)(?:-enc(?:odedcommand)?\s+)([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(EncodedBlob)
| extend DecodedRaw = base64_decode_tostring(EncodedBlob)
| extend Decoded = replace_regex(DecodedRaw, @"\x00", "")
| where Decoded has Marker
| extend DecodedPreview = substring(Decoded, 0, 240)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, DecodedPreview
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 5
content.title: Decoded payload (preview)

content.query:
let Host = "{Host}";
let Marker = "{Marker}";
let lookback = 24h;

let ps = Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 1
| where RenderedDescription has "EncodedCommand"
| extend EncodedBlob = extract(@"(?i)(?:-enc(?:odedcommand)?\s+)([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(EncodedBlob)
| extend DecodedRaw = base64_decode_tostring(EncodedBlob)
| extend Decoded = replace_regex(DecodedRaw, @"\x00", "")
| where Decoded has Marker
| extend ProcessGuid = extract(@"(?i)ProcessGuid:\s*({[^}]+})", 1, RenderedDescription)
| where isnotempty(ProcessGuid)
| project PS_Time=TimeGenerated, Computer, ProcessGuid;

let net = Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Computer has Host
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational"
| where EventID == 3
| extend ProcessGuid = extract(@"(?i)ProcessGuid:\s*({[^}]+})", 1, RenderedDescription)
| extend DestinationIp = extract(@"(?i)DestinationIp:\s*([^\s]+)", 1, RenderedDescription)
| extend DestinationPort = toint(extract(@"(?i)DestinationPort:\s*(\d+)", 1, RenderedDescription))
| where isnotempty(ProcessGuid)
| project NET_Time=TimeGenerated, Computer, ProcessGuid, DestinationIp, DestinationPort;

ps
| join kind=innerunique net on Computer, ProcessGuid
| project PS_Time, NET_Time, DestinationIp, DestinationPort, ProcessGuid
| sort by NET_Time desc
| take 10
content.title: Canary → destination (ProcessGuid join)
